prompt: Hyper-realistic vertical crop fashion portrait, adult female, 21+ years old, outdoor fashion event or backstage venue during golden hour. Tight framing from upper thighs to just above the lips—eyes and most of the forehead are cropped out, focusing on neckline, shoulders, torso, hands, fabric, and styling. Model slightly to the right, body facing front, head slightly turned to the viewer's left. Character: Warm fair to light skin—realistic pores, natural tone variations, faint freckles or beauty marks in the collarbone area. Glossy soft nude-pink lip color, understated and exquisite makeup. Hairstyle is a neat low bun with a few controlled stray hairs near ears and neck. Clothing: Form-fitting dusty powder-blue sleeveless bodysuit—wide straps, clean square-round neckline, high-cut leg openings, smooth stretch construction. Matte tech-knit texture: fine knit patterns, natural tension lines, small horizontal folds at the chest and waist, precise edge stitching, soft sunset highlights on the fabric. Paired with loose low-waist light-wash jeans, worn open and loose below the high-cut sides of the bodysuit—faded light blue denim, realistic weave, belt loops, front pockets, dark metal button, zipper fly, golden-brown stitching, soft seams, natural creases at the waist and hips. Pose: Dignified and composed. One forearm horizontal across the lower abdomen, hand resting lightly near the opposite waist. The other hand at the open waistband or front pocket of the jeans—long, relaxed fingers, clean natural nails. Anatomically accurate arms: delicate tendons, soft muscle lines, realistic hand proportions. Background: Soft-focus blurred upscale outdoor event or runway venue—white architectural tents or canopies, dark equipment, large black speakers, blurred seated guests or staff, low-key structural shapes. All background figures unrecognizable and out of focus. Creamy charcoal, white, grey, and subtle blue bokeh highlights. Lighting: Cinematic natural golden hour from the viewer's left—warm highlights on the left shoulder, collarbone, neck, upper arm, hands, and denim waistband. Cooler ambient shadows on the right for balanced contrast. Soft shadows under the jawline, around the neckline, under the crossed arm, and along bodysuit seams. Tones: Dusty blue, light-wash denim, warm skin, charcoal shadows, fine amber highlights. Camera: Vertical 2:3, 85mm, eye level, f/2, high-resolution portrait, understated luxury tones, realistic skin and textile details, crisp stitching, soft bokeh. No plastic-like skin smoothing, no exaggerated proportions. Negative: No text, no watermarks, no logos, no jewelry, no extra limbs, no deformed hands, no duplicate fingers, no cartoonish feel, no harsh flash, no overexposure, no explicit nudity.

promptZh: 超写实竖构图时尚特写肖像，成年女性，21 岁以上，户外时尚活动或后台现场，黄金时刻。从大腿上部到嘴唇上方的紧凑构图——眼睛和大部分前额被裁切，聚焦于领口、肩膀、躯干、手部、面料和造型。模特略微偏右，身体正面朝向，头部轻微转向观众左侧。人物：温暖的白皙至浅肤色——真实的毛孔、自然的色调变化、锁骨区域有淡淡的雀斑或美人痣。亮面柔和裸粉色唇妆，低调而精致。发型为整洁的低发髻，耳部和颈部附近有几缕受控的碎发。服装：修身灰粉蓝色无袖连体衣——宽肩带、干净的方圆领、高开叉裤腿，平滑的弹力结构。哑光科技针织质感：细密的针织纹理、自然的张力线、胸部和腰部的小横向褶皱、精确的边缘缝合，面料上有柔和的夕阳高光。搭配宽松的低腰浅色水洗牛仔裤，在连体衣高开叉下方敞开穿着——褪色的浅蓝色牛仔布、真实的编织纹理、皮带环、前口袋、深色金属纽扣、拉链门襟、金棕色缝线、柔和的接缝、腰部和臀部自然的褶皱。姿势：端庄沉稳。一只前臂水平横跨下腹部，手轻轻搭在对侧腰部附近。另一只手放在牛仔裤敞开的腰带或前口袋处——手指修长放松，指甲干净自然。解剖结构准确的手臂：精致的肌腱、柔和的肌肉线条、真实的手部比例。背景：柔焦模糊的高端户外活动或秀场——白色建筑帐篷或天幕、深色设备、大型黑色扬声器、模糊的就座宾客或工作人员、低调的结构形状。所有背景人物均不可辨认且处于失焦状态。奶油炭灰色、白色、灰色以及微妙的蓝色光斑。光线：来自观众左侧的电影感自然黄金时刻光线——左肩、锁骨、颈部、上臂、手部和牛仔裤腰带上有温暖的高光。右侧有较冷的自然阴影以实现平衡对比。下颌线下方、领口周围、交叉手臂下方以及连体衣接缝处有柔和的阴影。色调：灰蓝色、浅水洗牛仔色、温暖肤色、炭灰色阴影、细腻的琥珀色高光。相机：竖构图 2:3，85mm 镜头，平视视角，f/2 光圈，高分辨率肖像，低调奢华色调，真实的皮肤和纺织品细节，清晰的缝线，柔和的背景虚化。无塑料感磨皮，无夸张比例。负面提示：无文字，无水印，无 Logo，无珠宝，无多余肢体，无畸形手部，无重复手指，无卡通感，无强闪光，无过度曝光，无露骨裸露。
